summary: Iteration 110 - Security Audit Testing Complete. All 11 security bug fixes verified. 25/25 tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG-H1: Password reset no longer crashes - returns 400 for invalid tokens (not 500)
BUG-H2: validate_password in nexus_utils.py properly rejects passwords <8 chars and common passwords (password, password1, 12345678, etc.)
BUG-C1: execute_code in routes_ai_tools.py uses Piston API (httpx), no subprocess import
BUG-C3: validate_redirect_uri used in routes_code_dev.py (line 136), routes_cloud_storage.py (line 152), routes_plugins.py (lines 91, 131)
BUG-C4: safe_regex() used in routes_marketplace.py for all $regex queries (lines 71-72, 95-96)
BUG-C2: _authed_user helper with require_workspace_access enforces tenant isolation in routes_deployments.py
BUG-H3: _verify_channel_access helper in routes_nexus_browser.py checks channel access for all browser endpoints
BUG-M4: normalize_email() used in routes_auth_email.py line 71 for email normalization on registration
All existing features still work: orchestrations, webhooks, marketplace (verified with tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 110 security audit fixes verified: 1) Password reset validates strength before checking token, 2) Code execution uses Piston API sandbox, 3) OAuth redirect_uri validated against APP_URL domain, 4) ReDoS prevented via safe_regex escaping, 5) Tenant isolation via require_workspace_access in 18 route files, 6) Browser routes verify channel access, 7) Email normalized to lowercase on registration. APP_URL env var should be set in production for redirect_uri validation to accept valid same-domain redirects.

verified_security_fixes.BUG-H2_weak_password: FIXED - Rejects <8 chars and common passwords

mocked_apis.note: Piston API (code execution) uses public emkc.org instance
